title: onosma bilabiata
intro: Onosma bilabiata, also known as the two-lipped onosma, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Onosma bilabiata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties that may aid in wound healing. Onosma bilabiata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
